prompt:
Scene:
Same black studio macro setup and high-speed flash language as the reference image: pure black background, glossy black surface, cool blue rim light, crisp suspended particles.

Subject:
A red apple centered in frame at the instant a small fast projectile has just passed through it, with a clean tunnel, juice mist, tiny peel fragments, and pulp particles frozen midair. The projectile itself is not visible.

Important details:
Photorealistic high-speed photography, millionth-of-a-second freeze, macro lens, razor-sharp fragments, realistic apple skin texture, rim-lit droplets and pulp particles, black reflective tray, no gore.

Use case:
Second image in a high-speed impact series, preserving the same lighting and freeze-frame visual language while changing subject. Square crop-safe gallery card.

Constraints:
Use the reference for studio lighting and frozen-particle style only. No text, no watermark, no logo, no hands, no weapon visible, no blood, no cartoon style, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Apple Puncture
description: Apple Puncture freezes a physical impact in a controlled black studio.

depends_on.ref_role: preserve black studio background, flash duration look, rim-lit particles, and macro freeze-frame style

generation.runner_notes: Queue must inject dependency output URLs into ref_urls before execution; image2gen --ref accepts URLs, not local paths.

en.title: Apple Puncture
en.description: Apple Puncture freezes a physical impact in a controlled black studio.
